title: desmodium elegans subsp. callianthum
intro: Desmodium elegans subsp. callianthum, also known as Calliantha, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Calliantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, Calliantha is prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, although its herbal preparations can vary depending on the specific application and cultural context.
